description_long: This is a stone obelisk monument set on a rectangular paved platform, surrounded by a low stone post-and-chain fence. The obelisk itself is tall and rectangular with a slightly tapered top, and it stands at the center of the platform. In front of the obelisk, there are several smaller upright stone markers arranged in a row, likely serving as commemorative plaques or gravestones. The paved area is made of irregularly shaped stone tiles, and small patches of greenery or flowers are planted in rectangular beds near the obelisk. The entire structure is bordered by stone posts connected with metal chains, providing a clear boundary. The monument has a solemn, commemorative appearance, suitable for a memorial or park setting.
description: A tall stone obelisk stands on a paved platform, surrounded by a low stone post-and-chain fence and several smaller stone markers. The area features stone tiling and small planted flower beds, giving it a commemorative and formal look.
description_view_0: Obelisk viewed from an angle, showing the paved platform, stone posts with chains, and flower beds along the side.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the obelisk, the row of smaller stone markers, and the full extent of the fenced boundary.
description_view_2: Obelisk seen from the opposite side, with the stone posts, chains, and flower beds visible along the edge.
description_view_3: Rear view of the obelisk, showing the back of the monument and the arrangement of the stone posts and chains.
attribute_inscription: There appears to be an inscription or engraved text on the front face of the obelisk, but the details, language, and legibility are not clear from the images.
attribute_ornamentation: None visible beyond the inscription and the formal arrangement of the stone markers.
attribute_base_design: The base is a rectangular stone platform paved with irregular stone tiles, bordered by a low stone post-and-chain fence. There are also rectangular flower beds integrated into the base design.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is flat and slightly tapered, with no visible decorative features or embellishments.
attribute_surrounding_features: Surrounded by a low stone post-and-chain fence, several upright stone markers, rectangular flower beds, and a paved stone platform.
